items.title: Best dad ever US american flag gift for father's day Short Sleeve T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: best, dad, ever, american, flag, gift, father's, day. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
